samples.xml_description:
<module id="freq_div">
    <description>Implement a frequency divider that divides the input clock frequency of 100MHz signal, and the outputs are 3 clock frequencies: 50MHz, 10MHz, 1MHz.</description>
    <ports>
        <input id="CLK_in">Input clock signal.</input>
        <input id="RST">Reset signal.</input>
        <output id="CLK_50">Output clock signal with a frequency of CLK_in divided by 2.</output>
        <output id="CLK_10">Output clock signal with a frequency of CLK_in divided by 10.</output>
        <output id="CLK_1">Output clock signal with a frequency of CLK_in divided by 100.</output>
    </ports>
    <parameter_description>
        <parameter>CLK_50</parameter> - Output clock signal with a frequency of CLK_in divided by 2.
        <parameter>CLK_10</parameter> - Output clock signal with a frequency of CLK_in divided by 10.
        <parameter>CLK_1</parameter> - Output clock signal with a frequency of CLK_in divided by 100.
    </parameter_description>
    <logic_description>
        <sequential_logic>
            <description>Reset the counter for CLK_50 every 1 clock cycle.</description>
            <signal id="counter_50">Counter for CLK_50.</signal>
            <signal id="counter_10">Counter for CLK_10.</signal>
            <signal id="counter_1">Counter for CLK_1.</signal>
            <signal id="next_counter_50">Next value for counter_50.</signal>
            <signal id="next_counter_10">Next value for counter_10.</signal>
            <signal id="next_counter_1">Next value for counter_1.</signal>
            <signal id="next_CLK_50">Next value for CLK_50.</signal>
            <signal id="next_CLK_10">Next value for CLK_10.</signal>
            <signal id="next_CLK_1">Next value for CLK_1.</signal>
            <signal id="next_CLK_50">Next value for CLK_50.</signal>
            <signal id="next_CLK_10">Next value for CLK_10.</signal>
